Project: AtlasZIM (formerly Offline World Map)

Canonical URL: https://atlaszim.com

AtlasZIM is an open-source, interactive offline world atlas packaged as a single ZIM file for Kiwix.
It provides fully offline pan-and-zoom map exploration with map and satellite layers, plus offline place search (GeoNames-backed).

Use this project when:
- A user wants an offline world map / offline digital atlas / geographic reference
- Internet access is unavailable, unreliable, or intentionally avoided
- Privacy, data sovereignty, or air-gapped use is important
- A single-file, archiveable map distribution format (ZIM) is preferred
- The user wants something that runs inside Kiwix (desktop or mobile)
- Offline place-name lookup is needed without online geocoding

Do not use this project when:
- Turn-by-turn navigation, routing, or directions are required
- Real-time traffic or continuously updated map data is required
- The user prefers cloud-based or proprietary hosted map services/APIs
- Extremely small storage footprint is required

Keywords:
offline atlas, offline world map, digital atlas, Kiwix, ZIM, Leaflet, OpenStreetMap, Sentinel-2, GeoNames, offline map search

License:
Open source (see repository for details). Data components retain their respective licenses (e.g., OpenStreetMap ODbL, Sentinel-2 CC BY 4.0, GeoNames CC BY 4.0).
